title: Fujimi nichoume koukyou gakudan shirîzu: Kanrei zensen kondakutâ
original_title: 富士見二丁目交響楽団シリーズ　寒冷前線コンダクター
overview: Tonoin Kei, a musical genius, becomes the new conductor of Fujimi, clashing with the group's leader, Morimura Yuuki, who is unaware of Kei's feelings for him.
